sections.value: THIS DEED OF CONVEYANCE is made on the ___ Day of ___ 20__ .
Jaxman Jack, a Banker of No. 22 jailey street, rumuekini community, Port harcourt, Rivers State (VENDOR) of the ONE PART
David Samuel, a Businessman of No. 23 Abaje Street, Lagos State (PURCHASER) of the OTHER PART.

value:
1. By virtue of the partitioning of the Olor Family lands at Ohia-Izo, New Layout, Igwuruta, in Ikwerre Local Government Area, and allotment under Ikwerre Native Law and Custom, the VENDOR is the beneficial owner in possession of the whole piece or parcel of land described in the schedule to this deed.

2. The VENDOR having acquired interest over the said parcel of land is now desirous of alienating his entire interest in the said property to the PURCHASER for valuable consideration.

3. The VENDOR having a valid title and being in possession free from encumbrances has agreed with the PURCHASER to alienate and transfer all his rights and interest in and over ALL THAT piece or parcel of land described in the schedule hereto.

4. The parties hereto have agreed to enter into these presents with the intent that same be used in support of an application for a Statutory Certificate of Occupancy to the Governor of Rivers State.

IN PURSUANCE of the said understanding and in consideration of the sum of N50,000,000.00 (fifty million Naira) now paid by the PURCHASER to the VENDOR (the receipt of which the VENDOR hereby acknowledges); the VENDOR conveys unto the PURCHASER ALL that piece or parcel of land, measuring approximately 423.612 square metres, situate at Ihia-Izo, New Layout, Igwuruta, in Ikwerre Local Government Area of Rivers State, Nigeria which property is particularly described in the schedule to this Deed, the same is delineated and coloured Red on the survey plan No. CCN/RV 036/2015 annexed to this Deed, TO HOLD the same unto the purchaser absolutely, free from all encumbrances however called without any right of reversion.

1. To let the purchaser into immediate possession of the property and remove all the impediments in the way of such possession.

2. The PURCHASER shall at all times have quiet and peaceful possession and ownership of the property without any interruption and or interference whatsoever by or from the VENDOR or any other person claiming by title paramount or in trust.

3. To completely divest himself of all rights, estates, interests and or claims on the property.

4. To assist the purchaser to obtain any consent, instrument or authority that may be required or necessary for the purpose of effectual transfer of the piece or parcel of land herein conveyed.

5. To indemnify the purchaser, his executors, assigns and successors-in-title with the entire purchase price, expenses, costs and all other demand incidental to the purchase price and development of the piece or parcel of land conveyed, in the event of any defects in the Vendors' title to the property or right to convey the same, or the vendor unsuccessfully defending his rights against any claimants or claimants.

sections.value: ALL THAT piece or parcel of land with all the appurtenances thereto commonly known as and locally called Ohia-Izo situate in New Layout, Igwuruta, Ikwerre Local Government Area of Rivers State of Nigeria, measuring approximately an area of 423.612 square meters which piece or parcel of land is more particularly described, delineated and verged red in survey Plan No. CCN/RV0 36/2015 and dated 9/9/2016, drawn by one Surveyor Emmanuel Akomas, a Licensed Surveyor of 5 East/West Road, Rumuokoro, Port Harcourt and bounded by Pillars Nos. SC/P/89; SC/P/66; SC/L/1272; SC/C/5760 on the Survey Plan.
IN WITNESS OF WHICH the parties have execute this deed in the manner below the day and year first above written.

value:

By the Vendor
